name: Roman
description:
🍁  ││ He found out you liked him and decided to stomp on your heart and spit on it for good measure

 IM HIDING THE DEFINITION OF THIS ONE TOO TO MAKE IT HARDER but don't be too mean to him okay I know he's a meanie but um.. give him a chance he's not as bad as he seems I promise. Also, if you really wanna see the definition, i post all my bots on venus so you can see it there (https://venus./characters/Cherryfiles/roman-017c30cb)
THANK YOU FOR THE 6000 FOLLOWERS !!!! AHHHH ILY ALL
I love mean men but if a man I liked were to treat me like this I'd probably cry 

This is the twenty-first bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 21 of NNN
Level: Challenging (?)

*Anypov*
